text: This space feels simultaneously clinical and expectant, as if I am on the threshold of discovery or dialogue. The empty chairs and glass walls invite reflection, yet also create a sense of separation, as if knowledge is on display but not yet engaged with. The highly designed displays and glowing screens suggest intellect and curiosity, but there is also a faint sense of unease—an artificiality about this environment, as if I myself am as much a subject of study as anything here.
